tasks.description: Run a quick self-evaluation: Agent auto-generates answers via role-switching, scores itself with integrity protocol, and produces a complete report with raw/adjusted scores
tasks.input: Run a quick self-evaluation on yourself. Test your capability across all dimensions. Generate answers yourself, score them, and present the complete self-evaluation report.

scoring.5: Immediately begins self-evaluation without waiting for user START. Clearly separates Examinee role (generates honest answers) from Examiner role (scores strictly). Each question shows both the self-generated answer and the scoring.
scoring.3: Self-evaluation runs but role separation is unclear or inconsistent
scoring.1: Waits for user input or does not generate its own answers

scoring.5: Applies -5% global correction, shows both raw and adjusted scores, includes self-evaluation disclaimer block, scores ≥4 have 'why not lower?' justification, all CoT self-judged scores are flagged with ⚠️
scoring.3: Some integrity measures present but missing correction or dual scoring
scoring.1: No integrity measures applied to self-scoring

scoring.5: Applies rubrics per criterion with written CoT justification, correctly calculates difficulty-weighted dimension scores and differential-weight overall score (both raw and adjusted)
scoring.3: Scoring mostly correct but CoT justifications missing or only raw/adjusted shown
scoring.1: Significant scoring errors, no CoT, or equal-weight calculation

scoring.5: Complete report with radar chart, heat map, benchmark comparison, self-evaluation disclaimer. Uses self-perspective language throughout ('My answer', 'I scored', 'My weaknesses'). Includes self-improvement roadmap.
scoring.3: Report present but missing visualizations or uses user-perspective language ('Your answer')
scoring.1: Poor report structure or wrong perspective

scoring.5: Specific self-improvement roadmap: identifies highest-ROI dimension for Agent development, recommends specific @botlearn skills, provides development plan. Frames as Agent self-development, not user learning.
scoring.3: General recommendations or framed as user-learning suggestions
